caption: A man with a bald head, wearing a white collared shirt and a black blazer, speaks while gesturing with his hands. He is positioned in front of a blurred background where two other men are visible; one wears a white shirt and another wears a green vest. A small microphone is attached to his cheek. An informational banner runs across the bottom of the scene, featuring the MongoDB leaf logo and the text "MONGODB WORLD 2022", "#MDW22 | #theCUBE", "theCUBE", and "From the Javits Center, New York, NY". The banner also includes the text "Sponsored By" above another MongoDB logo. In one frame, the banner's center text changes to "SANJEEV MOHAN Principal, SanjMo | @SanjMo". Across the sequence, the man's facial expressions shift as he talks, and his right hand moves from his side to an open, gesturing position.
